sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43162" key="e(teroklone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερο-κλονέω</orth>, <sense id="n43162.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shake to one side</tr_>, Opp.C.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:4:204" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.204</biblScope> </bibl> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλινέω</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
